'''Nandi''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who worked at [[Naberrie family/Legends|House Naberrie's]] retreat house, [[Varykino/Legends|Varykino]], in [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo's]] [[Lake Country/Legends|Lake Country]], during the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
[[File:Teckla2.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Teckla Minnau, Nandi's half-sister]]
Nandi and her half-sister, [[Teckla Minnau/Legends|Teckla Minnau]], were born in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Parrlay]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] to a middle-class [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] [[Minnau family|family]]. They later lived with their older brother, [[Rehtul Minnau]], in the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] city of [[Theed/Legends|Theed]], where the two girls attended a private [[school]] to learn etiquette, hospitality, history, and the arts. When the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|invaded]] Naboo in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Nandi went into hiding in the [[Swamp/Legends|swamps]] with Teckla and several [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]] members, but she was soon separated from her sister by the growing conflict, only to be reunited with her at the [[Freedom of Naboo/Legends|Celebration Parade]]. Nandi and Teckla then finished their schooling and went on to work for [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] as servants at [[Varykino/Legends|Varykino]], Amidala's [[Naberrie family/Legends|family]] retreat.<ref name="DB" />

[[File:Lake_Retreat_2.png|thumb|right|260px|Varykino, House Naberrie's lake retreat]]
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Amidala and her [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], used Varykino as a sanctuary after two failed [[Plot to assassinate Senator Amidala/Legends|assassination attempts]] on the Senator's life. Nandi and Teckla [[Waiter/Legends|served]] them their meal, including [[Shuura/Legends|shuura]] [[Fruit/Legends|fruit]] as dessert.<ref name="AOTCn">[[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'' novelization]]</ref> At the end of the [[Standard day/Legends|day]], they said goodbye to the young couple and left the two alone.<ref name="FF96">{{FactFile|96|AMI 23-24|Senator Padmé Amidala}}</ref>

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Nandi was separated from Teckla once again when the latter left for [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to act as one of Amidala's [[Handmaiden/Legends|handmaidens]].<ref name="Pursuit of Peace">{{TCW|Pursuit of Peace}}</ref> Later in the war, Nandi's sister was [[Assassin/Legends|assassinated]] by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Embo/Legends|Embo]] on the planet [[Scipio/Legends|Scipio]].<ref name="An Old Friend">{{TCW|An Old Friend}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Unlike Teckla Minnau, the character of Nandi is not seen in [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']], but she appears in the film's script and [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones (novelization)|novelization]].

==Appearances==
